name: O-1 seed corpus: agent-dataset rows carry input, expected and bootstrap_seed: true so P-2 evals can grade subagent output deterministically
command: missing=0; for f in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/agent-datasets"/review-*.jsonl; do [ -s "$f" ] || continue; grep -q '"input":' "$f" || missing=$((missing+1)); grep -q '"expected":' "$f" || missing=$((missing+1)); grep -q '"bootstrap_seed":true' "$f" || missing=$((missing+1)); done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo agent_dataset_fields_present 1>&2
